---
title: Let Me Introduce Myself
author: "Daniel P. Riggins"
date: '2020-06-29'
slug: let-me-introduce-myself
categories: []
tags: [intro]
---

Hi, I'm Dan. I'm a pediatric resident with the IU School of Medicine in Indianapolis, which means I spend most of my time at the awesome [Riley Hospital for Children](https://www.instagram.com/rileychildrens/).
